script_text: A root word is the main part of a word.
Other parts can stick on to it.
But the root stays the same.
What is the same in all three?
Jump! That is the root word.
I N G, E D, and S are the extra parts.
What is the root word? Play!
The endings change, but play stays!
Cover up the ending. What is left? That is the root!
Now you are ready to find root words!
